title: Freezer Burn: The Invasion of Laxdale
original_title: Freezer Burn: The Invasion of Laxdale
overview: Disguised as executives from a Dutch Oil Company, Aliens from outer space buy a local farming company and promise to create jobs for the failing farming town. Their goal is to use crop circles to heat up the temperature of the earth and eventually turn the entire planet into a Club-Med for extra-terrestrials.
